section.title: NAME
section.p: attachCL - Colletion of child partition mounted under the main partition collection.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Colletion of child partition mounted under the main partition collection.

plentry.pd: The partition set name.(the name that contains a collection of space)
The boundaries, contains two fields "LowBound"(the value of the left section) and "UpBound"(R interval value).
e.g. {LowBound:{a:0},UpBound:{a:100}, means to take the field "a" range interval: [0, 100)

section.title: Examples
section.p: Mount the specified range in the primary partition of the sub-set of partitions collection.
